content: React component SSR testing pattern: use renderToStaticMarkup from react-dom/server instead of @testing-library/react when running under bun test native runner (v1.3.5). No DOM setup needed; assert on HTML string output. Requires SSR-safe components (typeof window guard for virtualizers like @tanstack/react-virtual).

Zustand v5 store testing: use getState().actionName() calls in beforeEach to reset state (not setState with replace=true, which requires full state including methods). Store hooks work in Bun SSR render context via renderToStaticMarkup.
